API_KEY_NOT_CONFIGURED: API Key is not configured. Configure it in Settings first.
BROWSER_FEISHU_REMOTE_DISABLED: Browser tools are disabled for Feishu remote sessions. In SpaceAssistant desktop, open Settings → Browser and enable "Allow Feishu remote sessions".
BROWSER_RATE_LIMIT_REJECTED: Request rate limit exceeded. Please try again later. Current limit: {{perMinute}} requests per minute.
BROWSER_RATE_LIMIT_WAIT_TIMEOUT: Timed out waiting for an available request slot ({{maxWaitSec}} seconds). Please try again later.
LLM_EMPTY_RESPONSE: The model returned no usable content
NAME_CONTAINS_PATH_SEPARATOR: Name must not contain path separators
NO_ENABLED_MODEL: Enable at least one model in default model settings first
PROJECT_MEMORY_ALREADY_EXISTS: SPACEASSISTANT.md already exists. Delete or edit it first.
TARGET_NOT_DIRECTORY: Target path is not a directory
WORK_DIR_NOT_CONFIGURED: Work directory not configured, cannot open project-level skill directory
